/usr/local/bin/arm-none-eabi-g++ -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections                            -fno-unwind-tables  -fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables                            -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wextra -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--no-warn-rwx-segment -Wl,--gc-sections,-Map,mapfile,-print-memory-usage --specs=nosys.specs  -Wl,-T "/Users/zakaria/Documents/Mikrocontrollertechnik/yahal_with_examples/YAHAL/cmake/boards/rp2350-launchpad.ld" -mcpu=cortex-m33 -march=armv8-m.main+fp+dsp -mthumb -mfloat-abi=softfp --specs=nano.specs CMakeFiles/face_demo.dir/Users/zakaria/Documents/Mikrocontrollertechnik/Project/firmware/src/face_demo.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/face_demo.dir/Users/zakaria/Documents/Mikrocontrollertechnik/Project/firmware/src/face.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/face_demo.dir/Users/zakaria/Documents/Mikrocontrollertechnik/yahal_with_examples/YAHAL/src/drivers/lcd/sharp96_drv.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/face_demo.dir/Users/zakaria/Documents/Mikrocontrollertechnik/yahal_with_examples/YAHAL/src/drivers/lcd/ssd2119_drv.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/face_demo.dir/Users/zakaria/Documents/Mikrocontrollertechnik/yahal_with_examples/YAHAL/src/drivers/lcd/st7735s_drv.cpp.obj -o face_demo.elf  YAHAL_face_demo/libYAHAL_face_demo.a uGUI_face_demo/libuGUI_face_demo.a
